hero.description: A Discord bot that supports voice channel statistics, automatic channel creation, music playback, and more
features.voiceStats.title: Voice Channel Statistics
features.voiceStats.description: Track each member's voice channel time and view daily/weekly/monthly statistics on the dashboard
features.autoChannel.title: Auto Channel Creation
features.autoChannel.description: A personal channel is automatically created when you join a designated voice channel, and deleted when everyone leaves
features.music.title: Music Playback
features.music.description: Play YouTube music in a voice channel with the /play command
features.gemini.title: Gemini Voice Analysis
features.gemini.description: Analyze voice channel conversations with Gemini AI to generate summary reports
features.newbie.title: Welcome New Members
features.newbie.description: Automatically sends a welcome message when a new member joins the server
features.dashboard.title: Web Dashboard
features.dashboard.description: Log in with Discord to manage bot settings and statistics from the web
setup.sectionDescription: Role configuration is required for all bot features to work properly
setup.step1.title: Add the Bot to Your Server
setup.step1.description: Click the "Add to Server" button above to invite the bot. Only the minimum required permissions are requested.
setup.step2.title: Move the Bot Role to the Top
setup.step2.description: Features like nickname changes and role management only apply to members below the bot role according to Discord's role hierarchy rules.
setup.step2.step2: Drag the Dhyunbot role above the roles you want to manage
setup.step2.notice: * The server owner's nickname cannot be changed by any bot
setup.step3.title: Configure in the Web Dashboard
setup.step3.description: Log in with your Discord account, then configure auto channels, welcome messages, and other features in the dashboard.
